---
title: "People"
listing:
  contents: people
  type: grid
  sort: "date-meta asc"
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  grid-columns: 4
  grid-item-border: true
  grid-item-align: left
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  id: currentpeople
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    tbl-cap-location: bottom
---
<!-- https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-listings -->

::: {#currentpeople}
:::

### Alumni

|                          |                       |
| ------------------------ | --------------------- |
| **Gianluca Randò**       | Master internship     |
| **Léa Zucchinetti**      | Master thesis         |
| **Ashkan Karimi Saber**  | Master internship     |
| **Ming Yi**              | Master thesis         |

## Collaborators

We collaborate very closely with all groups of the [Department of Rheumatology].

{{< include _links.qmd >}}
